Gods such as Tymora, Beshaba, Olidammara, Traveler, Glittergold, and Gari the Loki are mischief-makers who instigate constant challenge to the accepted order among both gods and mortals. They're patrons of thieves, scoundrels, gamblers, rebels, and liberators. Their clerics are a force for disruption in the world, priding themselves on freeing captives, mocking tyrants, and flouting hollow traditions.

Domain spells, focus abilities, and features related to the Tempest domain.

This section covers gods whose portfolios include Tempest. Domain rules are included for Stormborn deities. At 17th level, clerics gain a flying speed equal to their walking speed and are known for swift justice delivered with thunderbolts.
